info.title: Typeform API
info.description: Typeform API allows you to create and manage forms, collect responses, configure webhooks, manage themes, images, and workspaces programmatically.

get.description: Retrieve a list of forms in your account with optional filtering

post.description: Create a new form with specified fields, settings, and configuration

get.description: Retrieve a single form by its ID
Retrieve responses for a given form with optional filtering

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Filter responses submitted after this date

parameters.name: until
parameters.description: Filter responses submitted before this date

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Token for pagination after a specific response

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Token for pagination before a specific response

parameters.name: included_response_ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of response IDs to include

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Filter responses that match the query

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of field IDs to include in response

parameters.name: included_tokens
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of response tokens to delete
